title: FlightSegment
description: A single non-stop flight operated between two airports, forming a unit of an air travel itinerary.

departureAirport.description: IATA airport code of the departure airport

arrivalAirport.description: IATA airport code of the arrival airport

departureTime.description: Scheduled local departure date and time

arrivalTime.description: Scheduled local arrival date and time

airline.description: IATA airline code of the operating carrier

mode.description: Transport mode for this leg (e.g. BUS, RAIL, WALK, BICYCLE)

startTime.description: Scheduled or actual start time of the leg

endTime.description: Scheduled or actual end time of the leg

distance.description: Distance of this leg in metres

headsign.description: Destination sign text displayed on the vehicle

routeRef.description: Reference to the route served on this leg
